column1: 申し込み期限はすでに過ぎていた。
column2: もうしこみきげんはすでにすぎていた。
column3: The application deadline had already passed.
column4: すでに (already / by now — often implying too late or completed)
column5: すでに + Verb[た/ている] / すでに + Adj/Noun
column6: expressing that something has already happened by a reference point; often implies it was earlier than expected or that the window has passed
column7: すでに: completed action implying it's now too late
column8: すでに = already (often formal, with implication of 'already done' or 'too late'); もう = already/anymore (neutral conversational); とっくに = already long ago (colloquial emphasis)
